values.Description: A custom implementation of teams plugins specifically made for the TrixMC Minecraft Network’s flagship SMP – Derpitcraft. The Plugin was used by over 500+ users and is in active deployment at TrixMC even today!
values.Tagline: A plugin to manage teams on Minecraft Servers
values.Title: Bukkit Teams Plugin

values.Description: A search, sort and filter application for FDA Drug reports using React Query and NextJS
values.Tagline: A data viewing interface for the FDA Drug Reports API
values.Title: FDA Drug Reports

values.Description: Materials for the MongoMastery workshop conducted by me for the students of Department of Computer Science and Business Systems at Bapuji Institute of Engineering and Technology. The materials serve as a great starting point to learn about MongoDB and integrating it with flask.
values.Tagline: A guide developed from my workshop on MongoDB
values.Title: MongoMastery

values.Description: A simple web app optimized for mobile that is the UI representation of our idea submitted to BNMIT’s IBM Hackathon. Mostly Built over one night
values.Title: NeoMentor

values.Description: My take on building my own video streaming site. The site is built with a expressJS backend a React Frontend. The app follows the MERN stack.
values.Tagline: A YouTube style video streaming site
values.Technologies: MongoDB, Express, ReactJS, NodeJS, Javascript, TailwindCSS
values.Title: YouTube Clone

values.Description: A full-fledged online event management platform that allows organizers and presenters to share content of all sorts to participants. The app has authentication via Next-Auth and stores data using MinIO.
values.Tagline: A resource sharing site for events
values.Technologies: Javascript, NextJS, TailwindCSS, DaisyUI, MongoDB, MinIO
values.Title: Vachan MN’s Events

values.Description: A state of the art billing and invoicing solution for hosting companies using Pterodactyl built using Django. The project was deployed and used to server over 500 customers. The project’s internal fork (maintained by me) had complete payment gateway integration. The project has been out of active development since closure of the company.
values.Tagline: A billing system for Pterodactyl built with Django
values.Title: IvyBill

values.Description: A Flash cards app created using NextJS along with authentication. Uses TailwindCSS and Next-Auth
values.Title: FlashDown

values.Description: A NextJS template that integrates, NextJS App router, Prisma ORM, DaisyUI, Next-auth, and TailwindCSS.
values.Tagline: A boilerplate for NextJS, NextAuth, DaisyUI and Prisma projects
values.Technologies: NextJS, Javascript, Prisma, DaisyUI, TailwindCSS, NextAuth
values.Title: NextJS Next-Auth Prisma DaisyUI Template

values.Description: A repository of my attempt to install and work with Passkeys (formally called WebAuthn) on NextJS with Next-Auth and MongoDB.
values.Tagline: An early implementation of Webauthn (Passkeys) in NextJS
values.Title: WebAuthn – Passkeys with NextJS
